article_title: Linux Foundation Launches x402 Foundation With 22 Industry Backers as AI Agent Payment Infrastructure Takes Shape

content_preview.title: Linux Foundation Launches x402 Foundation With 22 Industry Backers as AI Agent Payment Infrastructure Takes Shape
content_preview.summary: Coinbase donates its x402 protocol to the Linux Foundation, joining Stripe's competing MPP standard in a race to build the payment layer for autonomous AI agents.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The Linux Foundation [announced the x402 Foundation](https://www.linuxfoundation.org/press/linux-foundation-is-launching-the-x402-foundation-and-welcoming-the-contribution-of-the-x402-protocol) on April 2, 2026, during the MCP Dev Summit North America in New York. Coinbase formally donated the x402 protocol to the new foundation, which will govern development of an open standard that repurposes the long-dormant HTTP 402 "Payment Required" status code as a native payment layer for AI...
